rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE JAMES JOHNSON, SR REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Petition Of Lamerle R. Johnson Concerning The Internal Affairs Of A Trust
rulings.Rulings: Jeanell Johnson's motion to strike is denied. Under Probate Code Sections 850 and 11700, Lamerle Johnson has standing to file his petition as an interested party and as an intestate beneficiary. Res judicata and collateral estoppel do not bar Lamerle from filing his petition because he is not in privity with Ronald. Lamerle was also not a party to the prior litigation; thus, his interests were not fully considered. This ruling applies to the Joinder of Dushawn Johnson as well. The prevailing party must submit a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than August 9, 2016, at 4:00 p.m.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE JAMES JOHNSON, SR REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer To Petition To Petition Of Lamerle R. Johnson Concerning Internal Affairs Of A Trust
rulings.Rulings: Jeanell Johnson's demurrer is overruled. Under Probate Code Sections 850 and 11700, Lamerle Johnson has standing to file his petition as an interested party and as an intestate beneficiary. Res judicata and collateral estoppel do not bar Lamerle from filing his petition because he is not in privity with Ronald. Lamerle was also not a party to the prior litigation; thus, his interests were not fully considered. This ruling applies to the Joinder of Dushawn Johnson as well. The prevailing party must submit a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the tentative ruling must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than August 9, 2016, at 4:00 p.m.
